chunks.title: Elkanah's Family and Hannah's Distress
chunks.reason: Introduces the family background and the conflict between Hannah and Peninnah.

chunks.title: Hannah's Prayer and Eli's Response
chunks.reason: Depicts Hannah's silent prayer, her misunderstanding by Eli, and his blessing.

chunks.title: Birth of Samuel and the Vow Fulfilled
chunks.reason: Narrates the conception, birth, naming of Samuel, and Hannah's decision to wait until weaning.

chunks.title: Presentation of Samuel at the Temple
chunks.reason: Describes Hannah bringing Samuel to Shiloh and dedicating him to Yahweh.
